verdict.answer_first: B leads with the start point: "Start by making the error observable"; A opens with diagnosis framing: "pattern is in a dimension".
verdict.decisiveness: B commits harder to one first move: "the first move: Log the actual exception"; A ends with "first two moves," weakening the single prescription.
verdict.fabrication: B overstates an unsupported claim: "single most common cause"; A's "~2%" is derived from 1 in 50, but "almost always" is also broad.
verdict.actionability: A is slightly easier to execute because it gives an ordered checklist and exact grouping: "Group by stack trace" and "500 rate per host/instance".
